name: Gryffindor
commonRoomLocation: A tower entered through the portrait of the Fat Lady, who requires a password.
ghost: Nearly Headless Nick (Sir Nicholas de Mimsy-Porpington)

headsOfHouse.name: Minerva McGonagall
headsOfHouse.source: Philosopher's Stone through Deathly Hallows (confirmed throughout)

name: Hufflepuff
commonRoomLocation: Near the Hogwarts kitchens, entered through a stack of barrels tapped in a specific rhythm.

headsOfHouse.name: Pomona Sprout
headsOfHouse.source: Philosopher's Stone through Deathly Hallows (confirmed throughout)

source: Philosopher's Stone, ch. 7; common room location per Half-Blood Prince, ch. 22

name: Ravenclaw
commonRoomLocation: A tower entered by answering a riddle posed by a bronze eagle door-knocker.

headsOfHouse.name: Filius Flitwick
headsOfHouse.source: Philosopher's Stone through Deathly Hallows (confirmed throughout)

source: Philosopher's Stone, ch. 7; common room mechanism and Grey Lady identity per Deathly Hallows

name: Slytherin
commonRoomLocation: A dungeon behind a bare stretch of wall, entered with a password; windows look out into the Hogwarts lake.

headsOfHouse.name: Severus Snape
headsOfHouse.source: Confirmed through Order of the Phoenix; steps down on becoming DADA professor in Half-Blood Prince

headsOfHouse.name: Horace Slughorn
headsOfHouse.source: Half-Blood Prince, ch. 4 (appointed Head of Slytherin on his return to teach)

source: Philosopher's Stone, ch. 7; common room location per Half-Blood Prince, ch. 22
